home.aboutText1: The National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine is the principal institution of higher education within the SSU system. The Academy provides training, retraining, and advanced professional development for personnel of the Security Service of Ukraine.
home.aboutText2: Established as a leading centre for security education, the Academy delivers thorough theoretical training and practical skills essential for effective operations in the field of state interest protection.
home.newsSubtitle: Current events and activities of the Academy
home.ctaText: Begin your path towards a professional career in national security

about.title: About the Academy
about.subtitle: The National Academy of the SSU is a leading educational institution within the Security Service of Ukraine
about.missionText1: The National Academy of the Security Service of Ukraine is the principal higher military educational institution within the SSU system, providing training, retraining, and advanced professional development for personnel of the Security Service of Ukraine.
about.missionText2: The Academy provides higher education at the first (bachelor's) and second (master's) levels, as well as the academic degrees of Doctor of Philosophy and Doctor of Sciences.
about.missionText3: The Academy's activities are focused on developing highly qualified specialists capable of effectively protecting national interests in the face of modern threats and challenges.

missionCards.title: Mission
missionCards.text: Training top-level professionals for the national security system

missionCards.title: Faculty
missionCards.text: Over 200 highly qualified academic and teaching staff

about.historySubtitle: Key milestones in the Academy's development

milestones.text: Establishment of the SSU Personnel Training Institute
milestones.detail: A specialised educational institution was created for training highly qualified personnel of the Security Service of independent Ukraine. This marked the beginning of an in-house school of security education.

milestones.text: Reorganisation into the National Academy of the SSU
milestones.detail: The Institute was granted the status of a National Academy, recognising the highest level of training specialists in the field of national security. The range of specialisations was expanded.
The Academy confirmed the highest level of accreditation, granting the right to train master's students, Doctors of Philosophy, and Doctors of Sciences. New educational standards were introduced.
In response to modern challenges, training programmes in cyber security and information protection were introduced. Specialised laboratories and a cyber range were established.
A complete modernisation of curricula in accordance with NATO standards. Integration of best practices for training security sector personnel.
Opening of a modern research centre equipped with advanced technologies for research in cyber defence and artificial intelligence.

about.structureSubtitle: Main structural divisions of the Academy
departments: Institute of Retraining and Advanced Studies
Department of Law and Law Enforcement
Department of Operative and Investigative Activities

admissions.stepsSubtitle: How to become a cadet of the National Academy of the SSU

steps.title: Document Submission
steps.text: Submit your application and the required document package to the admissions office

steps.title: Background Check
steps.text: Complete the special background check and medical examination

steps.title: Entrance Examinations
steps.text: Pass the entrance exams and physical fitness assessment

steps.title: Enrolment
steps.text: Enrolment to the Academy based on competitive selection results

requirements: Fitness for military service based on health condition
Successful completion of a special background check

programs.description: First level of higher education. Fundamental theoretical and practical training.
Second level of higher education. Advanced specialisation and research activities.
Third level of higher education. Research activities and dissertation defence.

education.featuresSubtitle: What ensures the quality of education at the Academy

features.title: Modern Equipment
features.text: Computer laboratories, simulators, training grounds, and specialised classrooms

features.title: Language Training
features.text: Intensive study of English and other foreign languages

features.title: Practical Focus
features.text: Internships, practical training, and participation in real operations

features.title: Flexible Schedule
features.text: Full-time and part-time study options for various categories of cadets

features.title: Recognised Diplomas
features.text: State-standard diplomas recognised in Ukraine and internationally

features.title: Library & Resources
features.text: Modern library with access to international academic databases

education.scheduleText: Training is organised in accordance with higher military education standards. Cadets combine theoretical studies with practical exercises, physical training, and drill instruction.

scheduleStats.label: weeks of field practice per year

science.title: Research
science.subtitle: The Academy's research activities — fundamental and applied studies in the field of security
science.directionsSubtitle: Key areas of research at the Academy

directions.title: Cyber Security and Information Protection
directions.text: Development of methods to counter cyber threats, critical infrastructure protection, and cryptography

directions.title: Legal Framework for Security
directions.text: Research on legal aspects of national security and improvement of legislation

directions.title: Operative and Investigative Activities
directions.text: Methodology and tactics of operative work, analysis of modern threats

directions.title: Psychology of Security Operations
directions.text: Psychological training, professional selection, and stress resilience of operative personnel

directions.title: Analytics and Forecasting
directions.text: Methods of information analysis, threat forecasting, and decision support systems

directions.title: Military Administration
directions.text: Strategic planning, command of forces and assets under hybrid threat conditions

publications.title: NASSU Academic Papers Collection

publications.title: Bulletin of the National Academy of the SSU
publications.description: Academic and practical journal on security matters

science.councilsText: The Academy hosts specialised academic councils for the defence of dissertations for the academic degrees of Doctor and Candidate of Sciences in specialisations within national security, law, and information security.
